message:
fix: set type=agent when reopening agent beads in CreateOrReopenAgentBead (gt-dr02sy)

The reopen path updated title and description but not the type. Old agent
beads created as type=task caused bd slot set to reject them with "is not
an agent bead", breaking gt sling for recycled polecat names.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
